# AIML Course - Day 9 Derivatives, Gradient Descent, Probability & EDA

This folder contains the Day 9 practice assignment covering calculus intuition, gradient descent optimization, probability distributions, and a full exploratory data analysis on the California Housing dataset.

## 📁 Deliverables

* `task1_derivative.ipynb` - Derivative and slope intuition on f(x) = x² + 2x + 1
* `task2_gradient_descent.ipynb` - Gradient descent mini-experiment with learning rate comparison
* `task3_probability.ipynb` - Probability basics with uniform and normal distributions
* `task4_housing_eda.ipynb` - Full exploratory data analysis on the California Housing dataset
* `housing.csv` - California Housing dataset (exported locally from sklearn)

---
**To explore notebooks locally:** Launch your workspace using `jupyter lab` or open them directly inside VS Code with the Jupyter extension active.
